text:
Once upon a time, in the lush and verdant forest of Eldoria, there lived a young qilin named Qwen. Qwen was unique among the creatures of the forest because she had the body of a deer, the wings of an eagle, and the gentle eyes of a cat. She was also blessed with the ability to communicate with all living things, from the tiniest flower to the mightiest oak.

One day, as Qwen was frolicking through the underbrush, she heard a faint cry for help coming from a nearby thicket. Curious, she approached and discovered a small, injured bird lying on the ground, its wing twisted and bleeding. Without hesitation, Qwen used her healing touch to mend the bird's wing. The bird, a finch named Frey, was overjoyed and thanked Qwen profusely.
